description: A custom integration has passed UAT and is ready to be deployed to the customer's production environment.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a deployment window with the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant and customer agree on a time for the deployment.

nodes.task_description: Deploy the integration script/application to the production environment.
Monitor the integration for a period after deployment to ensure it is running smoothly and without errors.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant confirms the integration is stable in production.
